data.title: Ripple Banking License Puts RLUSD in Focus As XRP Price Stays Cautious
data.description:
Ripple is expanding its presence in U. S. finance. The company has filed for a national trust, or rather, banking license with the Office of the Comptroller of the Currency (OCC), aiming to shift its RLUSD stablecoin from state to federal regulation
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/07/04/ripple-banking-license-puts-rlusd-in-focus-as-xrp-price-stays-cautious/

data.title: Bitcoin's Potential Surge Tied to U.S. Spending Bill
data.description:
According to Cointelegraph, Bitcoin (BTC) could experience a significant price increase following the anticipated signing of a substantial spending bill by U.S. President Donald Trump. The bill, referred to as the “Big Beautiful Bill,” is expected to be signed into law on Independence Day, potentially driving BTC prices up by nearly 40%. This prediction is based on historical data showing Bitcoin's positive response to increased U.S. borrowing. In late 2020, when Trump signed a COVID-19 spending bill, Bitcoin saw a 38% rise in value within weeks. Should a similar trend occur, Bitcoin could surpass $150,000.

The potential impact of the spending bill is further underscored by the projected increase in U.S. national debt, which is expected to reach $40 trillion by the end of 2025. This marks a significant rise from the $23.2 trillion recorded at the start of 2020, highlighting the unprecedented levels of borrowing. Analysts from The Kobeissi Letter have described this situation as a crisis, emphasizing the historical significance of such borrowing levels. Prediction service Kalshi has also referenced the $40 trillion figure, indicating the widespread anticipation of this financial development.

In addition to the U.S. spending bill, global liquidity trends continue to support Bitcoin's price growth. The expanding global M2 money supply has shown a clear correlation with Bitcoin's price movements, with BTC/USD historically following M2 trends with a slight delay. As of July 3, the global M2 money supply reached a new all-time high of over $55.4 trillion. This increase in liquidity is seen as a bullish indicator for Bitcoin, with analysts like Rekt Capital suggesting that M2 could continue to rise even after Bitcoin reaches a peak in its bull market. However, it is important to note that investment in Bitcoin and other cryptocurrencies carries inherent risks, and individuals should conduct thorough research before making any financial decisions.

data.title: LBank Q2 Meme Report: Memecoin trading volume increased by 13%, and the 100-fold coin and market share remained at the top of the CEX list
Sumitomo Mitsui Banking Corporation establishes "HOOPSLINK" innovation base to promote Web3 and stablecoin business co-creation
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Sumitomo Mitsui Financial Group (SMBC), one of the three largest banks in Japan, announced the opening of a new business co-creation base "HOOPSLINK" in Marunouchi, Tokyo, focusing on cutting-edge technologies such as generative AI, Web3, quantum computing, stablecoins and AR applications. The base aims to promote the co-creation of new businesses between large companies and start-ups, and accelerate the implementation of SMBC's existing stablecoin-related research into specific projects.

data.title: Belgian Court Sentences Three in Cryptocurrency Kidnapping Case
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, a Belgian court has sentenced three individuals to 12 years in prison for the kidnapping of the wife of local cryptocurrency entrepreneur Stéphane Winkel in December 2024. The kidnappers demanded a ransom in cryptocurrency. In addition to the prison sentences, the court ordered the convicts to pay at least 1 million euros in civil compensation to the victims.

The mastermind behind the crime remains at large. Although the victim was rescued by police, the ordeal left her with severe physical and psychological trauma, forcing the Winkel family to relocate. Stéphane Winkel, the founder of the cryptocurrency education platform Crypto Académie, has a YouTube channel with 40,000 subscribers. Following the incident, Winkel announced plans to shift his content strategy towards security education rather than practical wallet demonstrations.

data.title: SMBC Launches Innovation Hub in Tokyo to Explore Emerging Technologies
data.description:
According to Odaily, Sumitomo Mitsui Financial Group (SMBC), one of Japan's leading banks, has announced the opening of a new business co-creation hub named 'HOOPSLINK' in Tokyo's Marunouchi district. This initiative focuses on advancing cutting-edge technologies such as generative AI, Web3, quantum computing, stablecoins, and augmented reality applications.

The hub aims to foster collaboration between large corporations and startups to develop new business ventures. Additionally, it seeks to expedite the implementation of SMBC's existing research on stablecoins into tangible projects.

data.title: BBX Launches Platform for Crypto Concept Stocks Data
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, the crypto information platform BBX has launched a new data display platform for crypto concept stocks. The current data reveals that the market capitalization of crypto concept stocks stands at $2.18 trillion. Companies collectively hold 944,109.2 BTC in their Bitcoin reserves, while the assets under management for ETFs amount to $137.46 billion.

Globally, 66 companies have adopted 15 different cryptocurrencies as part of their strategic reserve funds.

data.title: Publicly listed Hilbert Group launches comprehensive crypto fund strategy with Bitcoin as primary reserve asset
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Digital asset investment company Hilbert Group AB (Nasdaq: HILB B) announced the launch of a comprehensive crypto fund strategy with Bitcoin as the main reserve asset. The treasury strategy will be overseen by a dedicated treasury committee, with Chief Investment Officer Russell Thompson as chairman of the committee. Hilbert is currently evaluating multiple competitive financing options from institutional partners that are designed to provide strong capital allocation capabilities for investors at different stages. (Access newswire)

data.title: Sidekick Introduces New Interactive Feature for Web3 Live Streaming
data.description:
According to Foresight News, Web3 live streaming platform Sidekick has launched a new feature called 'Link Mic,' allowing up to five guests to interact simultaneously during broadcasts. Hosts can activate the 'Invite Link Mic' mode in the backend, enabling viewers to request participation by clicking the call button on the live page. Once approved by the host, participants can join the live broadcast.

This feature supports real-time voice connections among multiple users, making it suitable for interviews, group chats, market analysis, and various interactive scenarios.

The platform stated that the introduction of the 'Link Mic' feature will expand the forms of live content, offering users a richer and more immersive real-time interaction experience. It also provides hosts with more space for creativity and expression.

data.title: Hilbert Group Unveils Bitcoin-Focused Crypto Fund Strategy
data.description: According to Foresight News, digital asset investment firm Hilbert Group AB (Nasdaq: HILB B) has announced the launch of a comprehensive crypto fund strategy centered around Bitcoin as the primary reserve asset. The plan has received unanimous approval from the board of directors and will be overseen by a dedicated financial committee chaired by Chief Information Officer Russell Thompson. The company intends to introduce a specialized transparency dashboard, offering real-time visibility into cryptocurrency asset holdings, underscoring its commitment to stakeholder transparency.

data.title: Cel AI Expands Asset Reserves with Bitcoin Acquisition
data.description:
According to PANews, British publicly listed company Cel AI has announced the purchase of 6.1794767 bitcoins at an average price of $109,791.00 per bitcoin, totaling an investment of $678,450.93. This acquisition is part of Cel AI's ongoing strategy to diversify its asset reserves.

Earlier, on June 30, Cel AI raised £10 million specifically for the purpose of buying bitcoin.

data.title: Chinese Tech Giants Alibaba and JD.com Urge Central Bank Approval for Yuan-Based Stablecoins
data.description:
Chinese tech giants JD. com and Alibaba affiliate Ant Group are pressuring the People's Bank of China to authorize yuan-based stablecoins, proposing to launch offshore yuan tokens in Hong Kong to counter the U. S. dollar's dominance in the $247 billion global stablecoin market
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/chinese-tech-giants-alibaba-and-jd-com-urge-central-bank-approval-for-yuan-based-stablecoins/

data.title: Binance Launches Institutional Loans With Up to 4x Leverage, Zero Interest Offers
data.description:
Binance has unveiled Institutional Loans, a new cross-collateralized credit line offering verified corporate clients up to 4x leverage.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/binance-launches-institutional-loans-with-up-to-4x-leverage-zero-interest-offers/

data.title: British listed company Cel AI spent about $678,000 to buy about 6.18 bitcoins
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official announcement, Cel AI, a British listed company, announced that as part of its ongoing asset reserve diversification strategy, it purchased 6.1794767 bitcoins at an average price of $109,791.00 per bitcoin, with a total investment of $678,450.93.
Earlier news, Cel AI, a British listed company, has raised 10 million pounds to purchase Bitcoin.

data.title: Binance Appoints Gillian Lynch as Head of Europe and UK to Advance Strategic Expansion and Compliance
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, Binance announced the appointment of former Gemini Europe CEO Gillian Lynch as its head of Europe and the UK, who will lead strategic expansion and regulatory cooperation. Lynch has more than 20 years of experience in financial technology, banking and crypto assets, and has served as a senior executive at Gemini, Bank of Ireland and Leveris. Binance said that this move demonstrates its commitment to promoting compliance development, strengthening user protection, and leading the mature development of the European crypto market under policy environments such as MiCA.

data.title: ETH/BTC bull James Fickel deposits 80,000 ETH worth over $200 million to Coinbase Prime
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to Ember Monitoring, the well-known ETH/BTC exchange rate bull James Fickel has just transferred a total of 80,000 ETH (about 204 million US dollars) to Coinbase Prime and its custody address. Among them, 30,000 ETH (about 76.45 million US dollars) were transferred to the main account, and 50,000 ETH (about 127 million US dollars) were transferred to the custody address. Last year, he lost about 20,632 ETH due to long ETH/BTC exchange rate, and has not operated for nearly half a year.

data.title: BTFS Network Advances Decentralization with Key Governance Proposals
data.description: According to Odaily, BitTorrent has announced that three critical governance proposals for the BTFS network, BTIP-89, BTIP-90, and BTIP-91, have reached their final implementation stage. BTIP-91 establishes a decentralized governance framework based on smart contracts, while BTIP-90 enables transparent on-chain management of file metadata. Additionally, BTIP-89 introduces a mechanism for professional storage service providers (SPs). This upgrade is expected to significantly enhance the network's transparency, reliability, and community autonomy, marking a crucial step towards a fully decentralized storage infrastructure.

data.title: Hong Kong Subsidiaries of Public Funds Prepare for Stablecoin Integration
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, some Hong Kong subsidiaries of public funds are actively preparing for stablecoin integration within their ecosystems. Among these, China Asset Management Co., Ltd. (Hua Xia Fund) is participating in a stablecoin sandbox test, which includes aspects such as issuance, payment, asset connection, and fund redemption.

Hua Xia Fund has stated its intention to continue launching more tokenized fund products. The company aims to facilitate secondary circulation of tokenized funds on compliant trading platforms and explore the use of digital currencies, such as stablecoins and digital Hong Kong dollars, for settlement. This initiative is expected to enhance the efficiency of on-chain fund transactions.
